list.title: Spots
list.lead: Explore Hungary's SUP spots — current water conditions and SUP index for every location.

stale.label: Stale data
stale.hint: The reading is more than 30 minutes old — not current.

flag.offshoreWindHint: The wind pushes from the shore toward open water — do not drift away from the shore.

map.title: Map
map.focusMap: The spot's location on the map

detail.noSnapshot: There is no reading for this spot yet.

reports.title: Recent reports
reports.empty: No reports have been submitted for this spot yet.
reports.loginPrompt: Sign in to submit a report.
reports.confirmPrompt: Confirm your e-mail address to submit this.
reports.success: Thank you, your report has been recorded.

stormAlert.headline: Get to shore now!
stormAlert.body: A level 2 storm warning is in effect near {{spotName}} — staying on the water with a SUP is forbidden and life-threatening.

steps.1: Paddle to the nearest shore — not necessarily back to your starting point if that is farther away.
steps.2: If you cannot reach the shore: kneel down, reduce your wind profile, keep your ankle leash on.
steps.3: If you are in trouble, call water rescue: +36 30 383 8383.
